subcodes.first_line: The designation of the Qiblih and its promulgation doth not, at this time, accord with consummate wisdom. At the appointed hour it shall be proclaimed, and thereafter spread abroad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعیین قبله و شهرتش الان مقتضای حکمت بالغه نیست در وقتش اعلان خواهد شد ثم انشر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @wisdom [hikmat], @law of obligatory prayer
